title: Großstadtmelodie
writer: Else Feldbinder, Wolfgang Liebeneiner, Géza von Cziffra
actors: Hilde Krahl, Werner Hinz, Karl John
plot: A passionate provincial photographer's rare photo is put on cover of famous journal. Hopeful, she goes to Berlin, for fame, but it eludes her. She finally gets it, and almost her man, to part ways, as he has only time for work, no...
